pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to leverage Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support the 'release' flag and Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not fully support the 'release' flag or Java 11 toolchains correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configuration with the unified 'release' flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Cobertura Maven plugin from the build plugins section.
pom.xml.why_exists: Cobertura is unmaintained and incompatible with Java 9+ module systems; it must be removed to avoid build failures or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Cobertura Maven plugin from the reporting plugins section.
pom.xml.why_exists: Cobertura is unmaintained and incompatible with Java 9+ module systems; it must be removed to avoid build failures or runtime errors.
